title: Proclamation No. 2084, s. 2010
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 2084

DECLARING WEDNESDAY, JUNE 23, 2010, AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE CITY OF BATAC

WHEREAS , Wednesday, June 23, 2010, marks the celebration of the Charter Day anniversary of the City of Batac;

WHEREAS , it is but fitting and proper that the people of the City of Batac be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, LEANDRO R. MENDOZA , Executive Secretary, by authority of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , do hereby declare Wednesday, June 23, 2010, as special (non-working) day in the City of Batac.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 15th day of June, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Ten.

By authority of the President: (Sgd.) LEANDRO R. MENDOZA Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary: (Sgd.) AGUSTIN S. DIZON Deputy Executive Secretary for Legal Affairs

Source : CDAsia
